name: zerion-agent
description: Zerion skills for OpenAI Codex — wallet analysis, swaps/bridges across 14 chains, agent-token policies.

interface.shortDescription: Wallet analysis and on-chain trading for AI agents.
interface.longDescription: Use Zerion to analyze any crypto wallet (portfolio, positions, transactions, PnL) and execute trades (swap, bridge, send) across 14 EVM chains and Solana. Includes agent-token policies for safe autonomous trading.
defaultPrompt: Swap 100 USDC for ETH on Base.
